channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Gachagua Outlines Vote-Based Strategy for Opposition Leader Selection Ahead of 2027 Election
item.description: The article details intense political activity in Kenya ahead of the 2027 General Election, focusing on emerging opposition alliances and efforts to determine President William Ruto's strongest rival....

item.title: US and Saudi Arabia Sign Civilian Nuclear Cooperation Agreement with Non-Proliferation Safeguards
item.description: The United States and Saudi Arabia have signed a landmark agreement to establish a civilian nuclear program in Saudi Arabia, with Washington emphasizing that the deal includes non-proliferation safegu...

item.title: Maduro and wife face June 2027 trial in US over drug charges
item.description: Venezuela's former president, Nicolas Maduro, and his wife Cilia Flores are set to face trial in the US in June 2027 after being captured in a military raid in January 2026. The couple has been held i...

item.title: Criticism of Trump's Policies Leading to US Troop Deaths in Jordan
item.description: The article criticizes former President Donald Trump's aggressive foreign policies, particularly his escalation of military conflicts in the Middle East, which allegedly led to the deaths of two U.S. ...

item.title: Afghanistan Names Rahmat Shah as New ODI and Test Captain After Hashmatullah's Resignation
item.description: Afghanistan has officially appointed veteran batter Rahmat Shah as the new captain of their One Day International (ODI) and Test teams, following Hashmatullah Shahidi's decision to step down from the ...

item.title: Google's Cloud Growth Fuels Massive AI Investments
item.description: Alphabet's latest earnings report highlights the success of Google's cloud business, driven by enterprise AI adoption. Cloud revenue surged 82% year-over-year to $24.8 billion, surpassing analyst expe...

item.title: Petrol Pump Owners Split Over Strike Decision Amid Government Talks
item.description: The government successfully divided the All Pakistan Petroleum Pump Owners Association (APPPOA), persuading one group to postpone a nationwide strike for two weeks. However, the association's chairman...

item.title: Super funds investing in gambling companies despite social harms
item.description: Australians are losing over $32 billion annually to gambling, with superannuation funds investing $15 billion in gambling-related companies. A report by the Alliance for Gambling Reform highlights tha...

item.title: Durban actress TeKayha Sukuram achieves dual success in South African TV and film
item.description: TeKayha Sukuram, a Durban-based actress, is experiencing a career-defining moment after securing roles in both a television series and a feature film within weeks of each other. She stars in the e.tv ...

item.title: LPA Enters Philippine Area of Responsibility; Cyclone Development Delayed
item.description: The Philippine Atmospheric, Geophysical and Astronomical Services Administration (PAGASA) reported that a low-pressure area (LPA) has entered the Philippine Area of Responsibility (PAR), but its devel...

item.title: Calgary Police Search for Missing 11-Year-Old Boy with Autism, Focus on Empty Homes
item.description: Calgary police are intensifying their search for 11-year-old Parker, a non-verbal boy with autism who disappeared from his day home in northern Calgary. Acting Staff Sgt. Scott Guterson emphasized tha...

item.title: Government prioritizes efficient execution of DMDP initiatives
item.description: The article highlights President Prof Kabudi's directive to ensure the high-quality and timely completion of all DMDP (Development Management and Planning) projects. This order underscores the governm...

item.title: CCM-ACT-Wazalendo Reconciliation Marks Political Maturity in Tanzania
item.description: The article discusses the significance of the CCM-ACT-Wazalendo reconciliation process as a demonstration of political maturity in Tanzania. Analysts highlight how this agreement represents a pivotal ...

item.title: Philippines and US Collaborate on Pax Silica Initiative for Economic Growth
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. and U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio held discussions on the Pax Silica initiative during Rubio's visit to Manila for ministerial meetings. Philippine Ambassador Jose...

item.title: CBS Mornings Hits All-Time Low Ratings Under Bari Weiss Leadership
item.description: The article reports that CBS Mornings, a flagship morning news program under editor-in-chief Bari Weiss, has achieved its lowest viewership numbers in history. Nielsen data from July 2026 shows an ave...

item.title: UK Economy Sees Growth Amid Policy Reforms and Technological Advancements
item.description: The article discusses the current state of the UK economy, highlighting recent growth trends driven by policy reforms and technological innovation. It examines how government initiatives, such as tax ...

item.title: Odisha Police Summon Ex-IAS Officer Over Disappearance of Key Inquiry Reports
item.description: The Odisha police have summoned former IAS officer V.K. Pandian for questioning regarding the alleged disappearance of two inquiry commission reports linked to the 2008 killing of Hindu leader Swami L...

item.title: Alphabet Shares Dip Amid Continued AI Investment Trends
item.description: The article discusses the recent decline in Alphabet's stock price, linking it to sustained high levels of investment in artificial intelligence. Analysts note that while tech giants like Alphabet con...

item.title: SARB Interest Rate Decision and Its Impact on South Africa's Property Market
item.description: The South African Reserve Bank (SARB) is set to announce its July interest rate decision, which could significantly impact homeowners, buyers, and the property market. With inflation rising to 5% in J...

item.title: Federal Response to Wildfires Encircles Boston Bar, B.C.
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney has established a cabinet-level emergency committee to coordinate the federal response to nearly 900 wildfires across Canada. The Incident Response Group (IRG) aims to synch...
